metadata.thoughts:
**Identifying an upcoming strike**

I'm checking a document in Italian to see if it announces an upcoming strike. It states that on "Friday, September 20, there will be a national 24-hour strike of public transport" and mentions that service is at risk. The content details additional strikes, indicating that transport will be disrupted during different times throughout the day. Since the date is upcoming, it confirms that there is indeed an upcoming strike to be aware of.
